title: symphyotrichum hendersonii
intro: Symphyotrichum hendersonii, also known as Henderson's aster, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum hendersonii can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by using the plant's essential oil, which can be extracted through steam distillation.
